creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
Running the latest stable/13-n245952-7cddc353b63c with virtualbox installed and vboxnet_enable="YES"
in /etc/rc.conf
When trying to boot the system up, the system hangs on trying to run /usr/local/etc/rc.d/vboxnet

Hitting ctrl+c interrupts the script and system continues to boot. Narrowed it down to kldload vboxnetflt hanging.
